top_patterns.description: Expresses thankfulness or personal reflection, often with hashtags.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Frequently at start or end of captions
example_quotes: Thank you @toms_korea for a great 10 year anniversary kick off party.
Feeling incredibly humbled and grateful after Hollywood’s biggest weekend.

top_patterns.description: Describes a specific event, trip, or activity with minimal commentary.
example_quotes: Pic on left is 2 years ago doing the BBC, and one on right is today.
Incredible day visiting the Grand Gateway @TOMS store in Shanghai!

top_patterns.description: Shares a personal or family moment, often with hashtags like #grateful.
example_quotes: Back home with my little man. #grateful
Loving #ted2016 with my lovely wife @heathermycoskie.

top_patterns.description: Expresses thanks or invites engagement, often with tags.
example_quotes: Thank you team @TOMS China for the amazing afternoon.
Thank you @att for making the impossible, possible.

top_patterns.description: Shares motivational thoughts or advice, often with exclamations.
example_quotes: Make your own luck!!!! Happy #stpatricksday
Try on new @toms at the @tomsflagship in his hands and on his feet.
Thank you @toms_korea for a great 10 year anniversary kick off party.
Feeling incredibly humbled and grateful after Hollywood’s biggest weekend.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share experiences, showcase travels or events
example_quotes: Pic on left is 2 years ago doing the BBC, and one on right is today.
Incredible day visiting the Grand Gateway @TOMS store in Shanghai!
Back home with my little man. #grateful
Loving #ted2016 with my lovely wife @heathermycoskie.
Thank you team @TOMS China for the amazing afternoon.
Thank you @att for making the impossible, possible.
Make your own luck!!!! Happy #stpatricksday
Try on new @toms at the @tomsflagship in his hands and on his feet.

language_habits.line_break_style: Often no line breaks, sometimes comma-separated or paragraph

example_quotes: Thank you @toms_korea for a great 10 year anniversary kick off party.
Feeling incredibly humbled and grateful after Hollywood’s biggest weekend.
Pic on left is 2 years ago doing the BBC, and one on right is today.
Incredible day visiting the Grand Gateway @TOMS store in Shanghai!
Back home with my little man. #grateful
Loving #ted2016 with my lovely wife @heathermycoskie.

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent personal, grateful, experience-sharing tone with a focus on authenticity and connection.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more personal moments and gratitude, less promotional or generic.
